brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Gold zone transformation of Karpathy AI exposure data. Reads 419 rows from base.karpathy_ai_exposure (Silver), filters to bls_match = true (389 rows), derives stat_res via MIN(11 - exposure_score, 10), derives boss_ai_score via MAX(exposure_score, 1), drops Silver-only fields (slug, bls_match, soc_resolved_method, source_load_date, ingested_at), computes deterministic record_id via compute_grain_id with 'aie' prefix, adds promoted_at timestamp, and promotes to consumable.ai_exposure via idempotent promote pattern.

documentation.description: Transform Silver base.karpathy_ai_exposure into the consumable.ai_exposure Gold data product. Filters to bls_match = true (389 of 419 Silver rows). Derives stat_res (AI Resilience pentagon stat, 1-10) as MIN(11 - exposure_score, 10) and boss_ai_score (Fight AI boss strength, 1-10) as MAX(exposure_score, 1). Carries exposure_score, occupation_title, rationale, category, and soc_code verbatim from Silver. Drops slug, bls_match, soc_resolved_method, source_load_date, and ingested_at. Computes deterministic record_id with 'aie' prefix. Promotes via idempotent append with dedup on record_id.

record_id.transformationDescription: Deterministic grain hash computed via compute_grain_id(row, ['soc_code'], prefix='aie'). SHA-256 of concatenated grain fields with 'aie' prefix. Note: prefix changes from Silver's 'kai' to Gold's 'aie', so the Gold record_id is a different hash than the Silver record_id for the same soc_code.

soc_code.transformationDescription: Direct carry from Silver. No transformation applied. XX-XXXX format validated in Silver zone. Non-null in Gold because only bls_match = true rows are promoted (which guarantees non-null SOC).

occupation_title.transformationDescription: Direct carry from Silver. Karpathy's occupation title retained for display in MCP tool and frontend.

exposure_score.transformationDescription: Direct carry from Silver. Original Karpathy 0-10 AI exposure score preserved for transparency. Input to stat_res and boss_ai_score derivations. Actual observed range in Gold is 1-10 (no exposure_score = 0 rows survived the bls_match filter).

stat_res.transformationDescription: AI Resilience pentagon stat derived as MIN(11 - exposure_score, 10). Inverts the exposure score to a resilience scale: exposure 10 -> stat_res 1 (minimal resilience), exposure 1 -> stat_res 10 (maximal resilience). The MIN(_, 10) cap handles the theoretical exposure_score = 0 case (11 - 0 = 11, capped to 10), though no exposure_score = 0 rows exist in the current Gold data. Integer result, range 1-10. Backs the RES pentagon stat in FutureProof.

boss_ai_score.transformationDescription: Fight AI boss strength derived as MAX(exposure_score, 1). Every boss has at least strength 1. Since all Gold rows have exposure_score >= 1 (no exposure_score = 0 survived bls_match filter), boss_ai_score equals exposure_score for all current rows. The MAX(_, 1) floor is defensive for future data. Integer result, range 1-10. Backs the Fight AI boss in the FutureProof gauntlet.

rationale.transformationDescription: Direct carry from Silver. LLM-generated 2-3 sentence explanation of the AI exposure score. Display field for the Fight AI boss narrative in the FutureProof frontend and MCP tool get_ai_exposure().

category.transformationDescription: Direct carry from Silver. Karpathy's BLS category grouping (25 categories, e.g., 'business-and-financial'). Used for display grouping in frontend and MCP tool.

promoted_at.transformationDescription: UTC timestamp generated at Gold promotion time via datetime.datetime.now(tz=datetime.timezone.utc). Independent of any Silver timestamp. Replaces Silver's ingested_at in the metadata lineage chain. Framework-provided field set during promote().

record_id (Silver).reason: Silver's record_id (prefix 'kai') is replaced by a new Gold record_id (prefix 'aie'). The Gold grain hash uses the same key field (soc_code) but a different prefix, producing a different hash value.

slug.reason: Silver provenance field not needed in Gold consumable. SOC code is the authoritative identifier at Gold. Slug is available in base.karpathy_ai_exposure for lineage tracing.

bls_match.reason: Used as a filter predicate (bls_match = true) to select rows for Gold. All promoted rows have bls_match = true by construction, making the field redundant in the Gold table.

soc_resolved_method.reason: Silver data quality provenance field. Useful for Silver-level quality assessment but not needed by Gold consumers (MCP tool, frontend, backfill joins). Available in base.karpathy_ai_exposure for auditing.

source_load_date.reason: Pipeline metadata from Bronze/Silver not carried to Gold consumable. Available in Silver for lineage tracing. Gold uses promoted_at for temporal metadata.

ingested_at.reason: Silver zone metadata timestamp. Replaced by promoted_at in Gold zone. The promotion timestamp is the relevant metadata for Gold consumers.

rowCountLineage.description: 419 Silver rows -> 389 Gold rows. 30 rows filtered out by bls_match = true predicate. These 30 rows include ~28 'unresolved' rows (null SOC code, no BLS match possible) and ~2 rows with valid SOC codes not found in BLS OOH. No additional deduplication at Gold (grain uniqueness on soc_code is guaranteed by Silver dedup + bls_match filter).
